name: Presence and Usage of Renamed FFmpeg Binary to Potentially Evade Security Monitoring
description: Detects suspicious dropping and execution of a renamed FFmpeg application which can be used in masquerading and collection by performing covert screenshots and screen recording.

rules.name: Usage of Renamed FFmpeg Binary to Potentially Evade Security Monitoring
Dropping of Renamed FFmpeg Binary to Potentially Evade Security Monitoring

author: Krisford Macalalad & Jehhan Marcelo
